shell.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen bg-[#050505] text-white overflow-y-auto relative shadow-2xl border-x border-white/5

header.wrapper: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl px-4 pt-6 pb-2 border-b border-white/5
header.title: text-2xl font-bold font-[Outfit] text-white mb-4 tracking-tight

segmented_control.container: flex p-1 bg-[#121212] rounded-full relative mb-4 border border-white/5
segmented_control.tab: flex-1 text-center py-2.5 text-sm font-bold rounded-full transition-colors z-10 font-[Manrope]

status_filters.container: flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-2 snap-x
status_filters.pill: whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-colors cursor-pointer snap-start tracking-wide uppercase

booking_card.container: bg-[#121212] rounded-3xl border border-white/10 p-4 mb-4 flex flex-col gap-3 relative overflow-hidden transition-all hover:border-white/20 active:scale-[0.98]
booking_card.date_range: text-xs font-medium text-white/60 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-[Manrope]
booking_card.status_badge: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border
booking_card.thumbnail: w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl object-cover bg-white/5 shrink-0 border border-white/10
booking_card.item_title: text-base font-bold text-white truncate font-[Outfit] tracking-tight
booking_card.avatar: w-5 h-5 rounded-full object-cover bg-white/10 border border-white/20
booking_card.bottom_row: flex justify-between items-center pt-3 border-t border-white/5
booking_card.cancel_reason_block: mt-2 bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 text-xs text-white/60 border border-white/10 border-l-2 border-l-red-500/50 flex gap-2 items-start

buttons.base: px-4 py-2.5 rounded-2xl font-bold text-sm transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-[Manrope]

dialogs.overlay: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center justify-center p-4
dialogs.panel: w-full max-w-sm bg-[#121212] rounded-[32px] border border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col gap-5 shadow-2xl
dialogs.title: text-2xl font-bold text-white font-[Outfit] tracking-tight
dialogs.input: w-full bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 text-white text-lg font-bold font-[Outfit] placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#CCFF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CCFF00] outline-none transition-all
dialogs.textarea: w-full bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 text-white text-sm placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-white/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/50 outline-none transition-all min-h-[120px] resize-none font-[Manrope]

empty_state.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center gap-4 px-6
empty_state.icon_wrapper: w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center mb-2 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.02)]
empty_state.title: text-2xl font-bold text-white font-[Outfit] tracking-tight
empty_state.subtitle: text-sm text-white/50 max-w-[250px] font-[Manrope]

interactions_and_animations.list_animation: Animate cards with subtle fade-in slide-up (e.g. framer-motion y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1)
interactions_and_animations.tab_transition: Active segment pill uses smooth layout transition.
interactions_and_animations.hover_states: Interactive elements should only rely on hover in desktop views, active states (scale down) crucial for mobile feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design ONLY the Requests/Bookings tab in a mobile-first shell (max-w-md centered on desktop).
Strictly follow the #050505 background and #121212 surface colors. No gradients or deviations.
Use Volt Green (#CCFF00) exclusively for primary active states, Accept CTAs, and accepted status styling to keep it high-contrast.
The Booking Card must display differently depending on status. E.g., 'Pending' shows Accept/Reject; 'Accepted' shows Message/Cancel.
Render cancelled booking reasons natively inside the card using the 'cancel_reason_block' design.
Use Lucide-React icons (e.g., Calendar, MessageCircle, Info, X).
Include specific micro-interactions on elements: active:scale-95 on buttons and active:scale-[0.98] on cards to simulate a native app.
Dialog logic: Create styled custom overlays. Make sure inputs inside dialogs are large, tap-friendly, and match the dark glass aesthetic.
